title: Icicle
description: An introduction to the icy side of Minecraft.
body:
**Icicle Release 1.6.2 (ICE STAFF!)**

![All armors!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8de8c6d264d25c7d8ea31d955d40ea747f8f6edc.jpeg)

**Now With Icicles!**


Unleash your creativity with Icicle's ice blocks, now featuring thrilling updates. Craft frozen landscapes, detailed structures, and vibrant cities that reflect the beauty of winter. New slabs, stairs, and trapdoors offer depth and intricacy to your designs, leaving a lasting impact. Dive into a world of imagination and discovery, amplified by the breathtaking Giant Ice Spikes, where the rare Icy Poppy blooms. Equip new armor and swords to embody the essence of ice as you channel your artistic vision in this frosty realm. Elevate your building experience and let your creativity run wild in a winter wonderland like no other. 

 

 

**Common Questions:**

 

_What Are The Dependencies?_ - There Are None

 

_Is This Compatible With JEI?_ - Absolutely

 

_Are you working on it?_ - Currently, I am still a student and, for that reason, focus on my studies. However, in my free time, I work on this mod and learn C/C#/C++. So yes, I am constantly updating this mod, but be mindful that most of my time spent on this mod is during weekends, so updates may come out slowly.

 

 

 



License: You may download the mod from Modrinth and CurseForge. Please do not redistribute the mod under ANY CIRCUMSTANCES. Do not claim this mod as your own. This Mod is made by smplesco.

--The main channel for this mod is still CurseForge.
